productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Green Leggings
description: Style Note Add charm your little girl's spring / summer collection with this pair of leggings from gini and jony. Team it with a white tee and comfy footwear when you take her out. The blended fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Product Details A pair of green leggings with an elasticated waist band and crystal embellishments over the left hem Material and Care 95% viscose and 5% lycra Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not iron over decorations Do not tumble dry Do not bleach or soak Warm iron only
